# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in any `paidhima` repository, please
report it responsibly.

**Do not open a public issue.**

Instead, email **paidhima@gmail.com** with:

- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Affected repository and version/branch
- Any suggested fix (optional)

I will acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and provide a timeline for a fix.

## Scope

This policy applies to all repositories under the `paidhima` GitHub account.
Individual repositories may define their own `SECURITY.md` that overrides
this default.
